text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove wins the Shuka Sho and is crowned
Triple Tiara champion, showing Mejiro Dober an
ideal to aspire toward in the process.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, she has achieved one of her major aims as
Empress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She journeys on toward even greater heights in
order to be a beacon for all Umamusume.
